stem:
The table shows the number of members of two different chess clubs who competed in regional tournaments in each of three years. No member belonged to both clubs.

YearClub XClub Y
20201812
20211510
20222114

Of the members who competed in 2022, which of the following represents the fraction of members from Club X?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. In 2022, Club X had 21 competitors and Club Y had 14, for a total of 35 in 2022. The fraction from Club X is 21/35.

Choice A is incorrect; this is the fraction from Club Y. Choice B is incorrect; this uses the total across all years. Choice D is incorrect; it both uses the wrong year total and selects Club Y.
